<!--
Thanks for opening a PR. A few quick checks save us all time.
-->

## What does this PR do?

<!-- One-paragraph summary -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (existing CLI/API behavior changes)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Linked issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #42 -->

## Testing

- [ ] `python -m py_compile <changed module>` passes
- [ ] `python <changed module>.py --help` parses
- [ ] Smoke-tested against at least one public URL
- [ ] Added or updated relevant section in `README.md` / `CHANGELOG.md`

## Constraints checklist

- [ ] No new runtime pip dependencies (stdlib only)
- [ ] Works on Python 3.10–3.13
- [ ] No path assumptions that break on Windows
- [ ] No API keys or secrets included in code or test fixtures
- [ ] No telemetry / outbound HTTP added other than what the user opts into

## Screenshots / output (if relevant)

<!-- e.g. before/after CLI output, screenshots of new GUI elements -->
